metadata.title: Add account lookup endpoint
metadata.description: Adds a new endpoint for looking up account data.

fakeFindings.title: Account lookup misses authorization
fakeFindings.body: The new lookup uses a request-supplied accountId without proving the caller can access that account.
evidence: The patch returns db.accounts.findById(accountId) directly from a request query parameter.
fakeFindings.recommendation: Check account ownership or required permission before returning account data.
